title: More Fireballs
body:
# Introduction

Have you ever wanted to cast a real fireball in Minecraft? Like a real juicy ball of fire? Try out this mod!

![Fireball](https://media.giphy.com/media/v1.Y2lkPTc5MGI3NjExbzV2aHoxdW0wcHRtbmpieDl3Z2Z4bnFqYzk0eGI1b3JsZm9kaTN3dyZlcD12MV9pbnRlcm5hbF9naWZfYnlfaWQmY3Q9Zw/rKOOrqZVDTIYW7hiUg/giphy.gif)

# Features


- 8 throwable fireballs
- every fireball is craftable
- they are not single use - the fireballs have several durability points
- they have a cooldown
- blazes and ghasts now drop fire charges used to craft the fireballs
- 3 tiers of classical exploding fireballs and 5 special fireballs:

- **Small Fireball** - creates a small explosion
- **Medium Fireball** - creates a bigger explosion
- **Big Fireball** - creates a huge explosion
- **Bomberman Fireball** - a chain of small explosions in a 3D "plus" shape
- **Phantom Fireball** - makes nearby mobs glow for 20 seconds
- **Enderish Fireball** - teleports nearby players and small mobs high in the air giving them Slow Falling. It can only be used in the Overworld and End
- **Void Fireball** - cracks bedrock around the hit location
- **Unpredictable Fireball** - explodes and then jumps in random direction. Repeats it a few times

# Requirements

Latest version of Forge for Minecraft 1.20.1.

# Donation

If you want to support me and help me creating even more mods consider buying me a coffee... or a fruit shake or a pizza ;D ...or whatever will I be eating at the moment xDD

[https://ko-fi.com/lordddiamond](https://ko-fi.com/lordddiamond)

# Modpacks

Yeah, you can use it in your modpack! 😇
